business.type_label: lighting/AV equipment maker + distributor (with DELUX control software)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating THINGS — a product line of lighting/AV gear and the DELUX control software — via product grid, project proof, catalogs and downloads. Not trusting a named expert, browsing a portfolio-as-proof, or checking a place.

goal.one_action: get an equipment buyer/reseller to send the distributor contact form (or download the DELUX software/catalogs)

structure.archetype_note: B2B product/distributor site: home pitches software+products, a dedicated downloads/resources page (installers, control libraries, PDF catalogs), and an about page; two identical distributor-contact forms.

mapped.observed_as: ¡Descarga, instala y lleva tu producción al siguiente nivel!

unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section represents a software/resource download bay; storeBadges is for app-store links, miscellaneous is a weak catch-all

proposed_new.name: software-downloads
proposed_new.evidence: Dedicated DESCARGAS page + home CTAs serving software installers (setup_win_litetek.rar, mac_litetek.zip), control-library ZIPs, and screen resources — direct-download assets, not a purchase, catalog, or press kit

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; all 3 pages, CTAs, forms and embeds captured; clear B2B distributor+software intent

gap_findings: Software/resource download center (installers, control libraries) has no canonical section or closed-vocab capability — proposed as software-downloads
Distributor-recruitment form is a channel/reseller lead-gen variant, not a standard consumer inquiry — lead-form captures mechanism but not the B2B channel intent
PROYECTOS acts as case-study proof but proof.portfolio_items/case_studies counters read 0 (proof lives as external YouTube playlists)
